examples: The food was good and the wine drinkable.
The wine is still very drinkable, he added, unlike a red wine of that age.
In fact, it's cleaner even than that and could easily be made drinkable.
Even mixing it with blueberry and grape juice, as TNI does, leaves it barely drinkable.
The 2010 has an incredible nose of bramble and mature cherry and an appealing, drinkable finesse.
